title: ANGRAU – Drone Trainer, Drone Co-Pilot and More – 8 Posts

basic_details.job_title: ANGRAU Recruitment 2026 - Apply Online for Drone Trainer, Drone Co-Pilot and More Posts
basic_details.short_information: Acharya N.G. Ranga Agricultural University (ANGRAU) Recruitment 2026 for 8 posts of Drone Trainer, Drone Co-Pilot and More Posts. Candidates with B.Tech, Diploma Can Apply Online. The online application opens on 21-05-2026, and closes on 27-05-2026. The candidate shall apply online through ANGRAU official website.

qualification.education_qualification: B.Tech, Diploma, 10th Pass with relevant experience in drone technology, agriculture, engineering, computer science, and data analysis.

how_to_apply: Candidates who wish to apply for ANGRAU Various Posts Recruitment 2026 via email should follow the steps below.
